title: CVE-2026-3661 - Wavlink WL-NU516U1 adm.cgi ota_new_upgrade command injection

title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3661 - Wavlink WL-NU516U1 adm.cgi ota_new_upgrade c
